home.headline3: Only eligibility is shared with insurers.

home.connectPrompt: Connect your NEAR Testnet wallet to begin

tee.label: TEE

tee.desc: Genetic data is processed only inside IronClaw TEE and purged immediately after analysis.

home.footer: Powered by NEAR Protocol — IronClaw TEE · Confidential Intents · Chain Signatures

upload.title: Upload Genetic File
upload.description: Your file is never sent to the server. Only a hash is computed in the browser, then the original is analyzed inside TEE.
upload.supportedFormats: Supported formats: GenTok(.txt), VCF(.vcf), CSV(.csv), PDF(.pdf)

s1.title: MyDNA Insurance Agent
s1.subtitle: Gaining better insurance through your DNA, without exposing it to the world.

s2.title: The Problem: Three Primal Fears
s2.subtitle: Why genetic transparency is currently broken.
s2.p1Desc: Insurers use raw DNA to maximize risk profiling, leading to rejected policies or exorbitant premiums.
s2.p2Desc: Centralized systems are vulnerable to catastrophic breaches (e.g., the 23andMe disaster). Once submitted, data is out of control.
s2.p3Desc: Current insurance relies on generic averages, offering no precision defense against specific individual genetic vulnerabilities.

s3.title: The Solution: A Privacy Paradigm Shift
s3.subtitle: Gain the benefits without surrendering the data.
s3.c1Desc: Mathematically proves health eligibility without revealing any raw DNA values to the insurer.
s3.c2Desc: A physically hardened execution enclave that purges memory instantly after parsing the genome.
s3.c3Desc: An autonomous broker that isolates your risk profile to find the optimal pinpoint coverage.

s4.title: Product Journey
s4.subtitle: The 5-Step Seamless UX
s4.step3: IronClaw TEE Isolated Analysis & Instant Memory Purge
s4.step4: AI Recommended Coverage Dashboard (ZKP Certified Seal)

s5.title: Hackathon MVP: What We Built
s5.subtitle: An End-to-End Privacy Execution Pipeline
s5.b1Desc: Integrated with NEAR AI and Qwen models for isolated parsing.
s5.b2Desc: Noir insurance_eligibility circuit compiled and recorded on NEAR Testnet.
s5.b3Desc: End-to-end execution of private payments via Intents and MyNearWallet.

s6.title: Why NEAR, Why Now?
s6.subtitle: The Genesis of the 2026 Privacy Stack
s6.p: The simultaneous availability of IronClaw Runtime, Confidential Intents, and Chain Signatures makes this architecture possible today.
s6.boxDesc: AWS relies on a centralized Trust-Me model. MyDNA merges the physical security of TEEs with the cryptographic perfection of public blockchains, creating an absolute Trustless moat that mega-corporations cannot replicate.

s7.title: Business Model & Target Market
s7.subtitle: Subverting traditional insurance inefficiencies.
s7.r1Desc: Absorbing the ~15% brokerage commission traditionally scalped by offline insurance agents directly into the protocol.
s7.r2Desc: AI Private Membership providing continuous anti-aging and risk-management updates based on shifting health states.
s7.somDesc: Tech-savvy Gen Z/Millennials in Asia with prior DTC genetic testing experience

s8.title: Feature Freeze Rationale
s8.subtitle: Execution Discipline at V1
s8.quote: "Why didn't we integrate Agent OS and L2Pass immediately?"
s8.r1Desc: Financial protocols demand pristine signature integrity. Overloading the TEE enclave with massive Javascript frameworks or resolving off-chain SDK dependency hells jeopardizes core transaction execution.
s8.r2Desc: We rigorously focused V1 entirely on proving the absolute foundational security primitive — TEE isolation and ZKP processing. Once the foundation is impenetrable, we scale.

s9.title: V2 Advanced Expansion
s9.subtitle: Scaling from a Tool to an Ecosystem (Q3 2026)
s9.f1Desc: AI evolves from a passive responder to an active broker, managing your health state long-term and hunting for better policies.
s9.f2Desc: Unleashing multi-chain stablecoin liquidity (USDC) from Ethereum and Solana with 1-tap bridging to aggregate massive institutional pools.
s9.f3Desc: Executing high-net-worth policy premiums totally obscured from public mempools, terminating frontrunning vectors entirely.

s10.title: Open Source & Leverage
s10.subtitle: Giving back to the NEAR Ecosystem
s10.p1: We are open-sourcing our TEE-App Wrapper Boilerplate and Noir ZKP Logic Templates.
s10.p2: This drops the barrier to entry for building Web3 Privacy apps from weeks to just 10 minutes, fostering a fertile ground for the next generation of healthcare DApps on NEAR.

s11.title: Team & Vision
s11.subtitle: The endgame of Privacy & Finance
s11.roleDesc: Product Architecture, Next.js, Drizzle Edge DB, TEE Runtime & ZKP Contracts
s11.quote: "Our core proof: Deep personalization in finance is 100% possible entirely through blockchain privacy primitives, without ever sacrificing human sovereignty."
